rent.source: nomads.com Nha Trang Apr 2026 / expatlife.ai Nha Trang 2026
rent.note: furnished 1BR near beach; avg $377 center; $250-450 range

utilities.note: electric + water + internet; beach city A/C usage moderate

groceries.source: vinpearl.com Nha Trang cost of living
groceries.note: Cho Dam market; fresh seafood very affordable

diningOut.source: nomads.com Nha Trang digital nomad guide 2026
diningOut.note: seafood-forward cuisine; banh can, bun ca; tourist area cafes slightly pricier

transit.note: Grab + motorbike rental; linear coastal city, manageable

coworking.source: expatlife.ai Nha Trang / local coworking listings
coworking.note: limited formal coworking vs Da Nang; cafe work plus occasional hot desk; ~$60-120/mo

misc.note: beach activities, snorkeling trips, gym, entertainment, personal care

accomSeasonality._doc: 12 monthly multipliers applied to RENT ONLY (Jan..Dec). 1.0 = base. Raise for peak tourist/weather months, lower for off-peak.

evidence.claim: Nha Trang 1BR near beach avg $377; outside center $228; total nomad $800-1,000/mo
evidence.quote: A 1-bedroom apartment close to the beach in the Nha Trang center averages $377.91, while outside the center it's $227.86

evidence.claim: Nha Trang comfortable budget $600-1,000/month; best value coastal lifestyle in SEA
evidence.quote: Nha Trang offers beach town vibes with costs of $800-1,000 USD monthly. Nha Trang offers one of the best value-for-money coastal lifestyles in Southeast Asia

evidence.claim: Nha Trang internet 160 Mbps; apartments from $250-450/month
evidence.quote: Internet speeds are around 160 mbps. One-bedroom apartments rent from $250–$450/month

evidence.claim: Nha Trang considerably cheaper than Hanoi or HCMC for comparable lifestyle
evidence.quote: providing affordable beachside living that is considerably cheaper than Hanoi or Ho Chi Minh City
